candidates.why: Explicit total revenue line capturing all revenue streams; values align with overall top-line for the firm.
Alternate top-line label that may be used in some years; included as secondary priority per instructions.
Represents only a component of revenue, not the full top-line; therefore not chosen for REVT which should be overall revenue.
Balancing item, not an economically meaningful standalone revenue measure; excluded by rule to avoid balancing rows.
Explicit balancing item; should not be used as main revenue line under the rules.

variables.notes: Using Total Revenue as primary top-line; Net Sales as fallback if label changes across years.

candidates.why: Direct cost related to production/service delivery; behaves like cost of sales for subcontracted work.
Classic direct input cost; clearly part of cost of goods sold / cost of sales.
Balance sheet stock of raw materials, not a period expense; should not be used for COGS.
Balance sheet inventory line, not an income statement expense; excluded from COGS mapping.

variables.notes: Both chosen as COGS components; they represent main direct costs above gross profit.

candidates.why: Aggregated operating overhead bucket (excludes COGS); main SG&A-type total when explicit SG&A details are limited.
Clear SG&A component (overhead-type expenses) within Operating Expenses; not a total, so appropriate as an SG&A component.
Explicit SG&A label; appears with empty recent columns but per rules should still be included as it may hold values in other years.

variables.notes: Includes explicit SG&A line plus the main operating expense buckets to ensure coverage across years, following hierarchy rule (b).
No R&D-specific line item is present among candidates; treat R&D as zero for PROF purposes.

candidates.why: Primary income statement line for interest expense; negative values within Total Financial Expense; best representation of XINT.
Additional interest expense component; should be considered if primary Interest Expenses is missing for some years.
Interest portion of lease liability financing; part of total interest expense burden.
Represents profit attributable to minority shareholders, not an interest/finance cost; should not be used for XINT.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity income allocation, not interest expense.
Supplemental interest expense line (all nan in preview) but semantically valid; included as lower-priority backup.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; valid interest component, but lower priority than main P&L lines.
Balance sheet liability, not an expense; excluded from XINT.
Explicitly non-interest bearing; not an interest expense line.
Equity attributable to minority shareholders; not an interest expense.
Same as non-controlling interests; equity, not interest expense.
Represents future interest component of leases/debt; can serve only as a last-resort proxy if P&L interest lines were entirely missing.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental

variables.notes: Priority list follows main P&L interest expense, then components and supplemental disclosures; balance sheet Future Costs/Interest is a last fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
candidates.why: Represents parent shareholders’ equity excluding non-controlling interests; useful but does not capture full book equity of the consolidated entity.
Appears as a subcomponent placeholder; no values and not clearly the total book equity; not preferred.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent
candidates.why: Same concept as the correctly spelled version but appears as main consolidated equity line with values across all years.
Includes both equity attributable to parent and non-controlling interests; best proxy for consolidated book equity (BE).

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row, not an economic total; should be excluded for BE.
Explicit balancing item; not the target for BE under the rules.
Balancing item for equity; should not be used as BE when explicit Total equity is available.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Technical balancing line; not a measure of equity alone.
Represents total assets or total Liab+Equity; not pure equity, so not used for BE.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to sharholders of the parent

variables.notes: Uses consolidated Total equity as primary BE; equity attributable to shareholders of the parent is provided as a secondary label if needed.

candidates.why: Represents income attributable to minority shareholders; flow concept, but semantically matches minority interest label.
Duplicate concept/label for non-controlling interests on the income statement; same values in preview.
OCI translation adjustment related to minorities; not the main minority interest balance.
Part of comprehensive income attribution to minorities; again a flow/OCI item, not the equity stock.
Balance sheet line for minority equity in consolidated subsidiaries; best representation of minority interest (MIB).
Alternate label for the same minority equity amounts; included as backup label for different reporting periods.

variables.notes: Uses balance sheet minority equity as MIB, with both Non-controlling interests and Minority Interest provided for label continuity across years.
